Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Mr. Byrne begins by reporting on his efforts to locate the decedent's birth father to provide notice. Mr. Byrne advises that the decedent's birth father left shortly after her birth and was not present in her life thereafter. Mr. Byrne advises that the decedent's mother remarried, and that decedent recognized her stepfather as her father. Mr. Byrne offers additional oral testimony to support his petition and asks that the court dispense with notice to the decedent's birth father. The court advises Mr. Byrne that it is satisfied with Mr. Byrne's report regarding his due diligence in attempting to locate the decedents' birth father and is dispensing with notice, accordingly. The court then confirms that no one is appearing to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-25-2013 is admitted to probate. Daniel Byrne is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on the filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is set for Mar-16-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-16-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Continued To Oct-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
